title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: tQTLExperiment wraps tensorQTL GPU-accelerated eQTL mapping tool SummarizedExperiment-style container. key design principle two-step workflow keeps R Python separate environments: prepareTQTL() — writes phenotype covariate files directory returns complete python -m tensorqtl command string. user runs command terminal tensorQTL installed. readTQTL() — reads output files back R GRanges. avoids R/Python environment conflicts (conda PATH issues, rpy2 segfaults, duplicate OpenMP runtimes). Genotype data represented lazily via BEDMatrix — PLINK .bed file never loaded R memory. makes practical work whole-genome genotype files containing millions variants.

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: tensorQTL must installed Python environment:
code: if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))     install.packages("BiocManager") BiocManager::install("vjcitn/tQTLExperiment") pip install tensorqtl

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: vignette uses data MAGE study (Multi-Ancestry Genomics, Epigenomics, Transcriptomics), multi-ancestry eQTL resource. CSHLvc2026 companion package provides cached access chromosome 17 genotypes pre-filtered pseudobulk B-cell SummarizedExperiment. genotype data live PLINK format OSN cloud storage downloaded via BiocFileCache:
code: library(tQTLExperiment) library(CSHLvc2026)  data(mageSEfilt, package = "CSHLvc2026") mageSEfilt #> Warning: multiple methods tables found for 'transform' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'IRanges' #> Warning: multiple methods tables found for 'transform' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'Seqinfo' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'GenomicRanges' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'SummarizedExperiment' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'S4Arrays' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'DelayedArray' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'SparseArray' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'XVector' #> Warning: multiple methods tables found for 'scale' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::scale' by #> 'DelayedArray::scale' when loading 'SummarizedExperiment' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'AnnotationDbi' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'Biostrings' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'utils::data' by 'BiocGenerics::data' when #> loading 'GenomeInfoDb' #> Warning: replacing previous import 'BiocGenerics::transform' by #> 'S4Vectors::transform' when loading 'GenomeInfoDb' plink_paths <- cache_mage_chr17_plink() plpre <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(plink_paths[["bed"]])

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: tensorQTL requires numeric covariates. build model matrix colData using model.matrix(), drop intercept column — tensorQTL expect one. Dropping first column construction (rather using ~ 0 + ...) preserves reference-level dummy coding factor variables.
code: cd <- as.data.frame(colData(mageSEfilt)) mm <- model.matrix(~ batch + population + sex, data = cd) mm <- mm[, -1, drop = FALSE]   # remove (Intercept)

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: tQTLExperimentFromRSE() takes existing RangedSummarizedExperiment PLINK prefix, attaches lazy genotype matrix, optionally records genome build seqinfo.
code: tqe <- tQTLExperimentFromRSE(     se              = mageSEfilt,     plinkPrefix     = plpre,     covariateMatrix = mm,     genome          = "hg38" ) tqe

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: addGeneSymbols() looks HGNC names via EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79 adds gene_name column mcols(rowRanges(tqe)). Ensembl version suffixes (e.g. .3) stripped automatically.
code: tqe <- addGeneSymbols(tqe) head(mcols(rowRanges(tqe))[, c("phenotype_id", "gene_name")])

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: PLINK file covers chromosome 17 , filter SE matching features writing phenotype file.
code: is_17 <- as.character(seqnames(rowRanges(tqe))) == "chr17" tqe17 <- tqe[which(is_17), ] dim(tqe17)

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: prepareTQTL() writes pheno.bed covariates.tsv outDir returns shell command. built---maf_threshold flag one tensorQTL’s key advantages — pre-filtering step required. printed command looks like: Paste terminal tensorQTL conda environment active:
code: outdir <- "~/mage_tqtl_run" dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)  cmd <- prepareTQTL(     tqe17,     outDir       = outdir,     mode         = "cis_nominal",     mafThreshold = 0.05 ) cat(cmd, "\n") python3 -m tensorqtl /path/to/CCDG_mage_chr17 ~/mage_tqtl_run/pheno.bed \     ~/mage_tqtl_run/tqtl_out --mode cis_nominal --maf_threshold 0.05 \     --window 1000000 -o ~/mage_tqtl_run \     --covariates ~/mage_tqtl_run/covariates.tsv conda activate plink-env KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK=TRUE <paste command>

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: tensorQTL finishes, load results back R. Passing x = tqe17 propagates genome build gene symbols automatically.
code: res <- readTQTL(outdir, mode = "cis_nominal", x = tqe17) res$pairs

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
code: pairs <- res$pairs  # top associations by nominal p-value pairs[order(pairs$pval_nominal)][1:10,       c("gene_name", "variant_id", "af", "slope", "pval_nominal")]  # associations for a specific gene tp53bp1 <- pairs[pairs$gene_name == "TP53BP1" & !is.na(pairs$gene_name)] tp53bp1[order(tp53bp1$pval_nominal)][1:5]  # distribution of nominal p-values hist(pairs$pval_nominal, breaks = 50,      main = "tensorQTL nominal p-values (chr17, cis)",      xlab = "p-value")

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: package includes two datasets testing exploration.

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: testing object construction without external dependencies:
code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment")  tqe_ex <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed"),     genome      = "hg38" ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... tqe_ex #> class: tQTLExperiment #> features: 20  samples: 100  #> assays( 1 ): pheno  #> rowRanges: GRanges with 20 features #> colData( 0 ) covariates:    #> geno: 100 samples x 69638 variants [BEDMatrix - lazy] #> plinkPrefix: /private/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T/RtmpuS4nx1/temp_libpath5a4b140770e5/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100  #> use prepareTQTL() to write inputs and get CLI command

title: eQTL mapping with tQTLExperiment and tensorQTL
text: Pre-computed tensorQTL cis_nominal results demonstrate full workflow: Top associations nominal p-value:
code: demodir <- system.file("demodir", package = "tQTLExperiment")  # Load results: 71k+ feature-variant pairs on chr17 res <- readTQTL(demodir, mode = "cis_nominal") res$pairs #> GRanges object with title: Authors and Citation
text: Carey V (2026). tQTLExperiment: SummarizedExperiment Interface tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool. R package version 0.1.16, https://github.com/vjcitn/tQTLExperiment.
code: @Manual{,   title = {tQTLExperiment: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool},   author = {Vincent Carey},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.16},   url = {https://github.com/vjcitn/tQTLExperiment}, }

what: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool
title: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool
text: package defines data structure combines molecular phenotype data genotype data PLINK bed format. functions package permit interoperation tensorqtl collect statistics association genotype molecular phenotypes.

title: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool
code: > tqe class: tQTLExperiment features: 20  samples: 100 assays( 1 ): pheno rowRanges: GRanges with 20 features colData( 11 ) covariates: int, sex, age, expr_pc1 ... geno: 100 samples x 69638 variants [BEDMatrix - lazy] plinkPrefix: /Library/Frameworks/R.framework/Versions/4.6/Resources/library/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100 use prepareTQTL() to write inputs and get CLI command > assay(tqe[1:3,1:4])                    691_692 693_694     688_689    683_684 ENSG00000100181 0.00000000       0 0.006378173 0.00000000 ENSG00000237438 0.00000000       0 0.000000000 0.00000000 ENSG00000177663 0.01798248       0 0.039776113 0.01103418 > tqtlGeno(tqe)[1:4,1:3]           22:16849573A-G_G 22:16849971A-T_T 22:16850437G-A_A 0_691_692                1                1                1 0_693_694                1                1                1 0_688_689                1                1                1 0_683_684                1                1                1 > tqe = addGeneSymbols(tqe) > rowRanges(tqe[1:3,]) GRanges object with 3 ranges and 2 metadata columns:                   seqnames    ranges strand |    phenotype_id   gene_name                      <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle> |     <character> <character>   ENSG00000100181       22  17082777      * | ENSG00000100181      TPTEP1   ENSG00000237438       22  17517460      * | ENSG00000237438       CECR7   ENSG00000177663       22  17565844      * | ENSG00000177663      IL17RA   -------   seqinfo: 1 sequence from hg38 genome; no seqlengths

title: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool
text: present, python/R interop well-established. export data specified, existing folder. prepareTQTL function provides string can used compute association statistics.
code: > tt = prepareTQTL(tqe, outDir="/tmp/test1") > tt [1] "python3 -m tensorqtl /Library/Frameworks/R.framework/Versions/4.6/Resources/library/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100 /tmp/test1/pheno.bed /tmp/test1/tqtl_out --mode cis_nominal --maf_threshold 0.05 --window 1000000 -o /tmp/test1 --covariates /tmp/test1/covariates.tsv"

title: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool
code: python3 -m tensorqtl /Library/Frameworks/R.framework/Versions/4.6/Resources/library/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100 /tmp/test1/pheno.bed /tmp/test1/tqtl_out --mode cis_nominal --maf_threshold 0.05 --window 1000000 -o /tmp/test1 --covariates /tmp/test1/covariates.tsv Warning: 'rfunc' cannot be imported. R with the 'qvalue' library and the 'rpy2' Python package are needed to compute q-values. title: SummarizedExperiment Interface for the tensorQTL eQTL Mapping Tool
text: improvements needed …

what: Add gene symbols to rowRanges — addGeneSymbols
title: Add gene symbols to rowRanges — addGeneSymbols
text: Looks HGNC gene symbols Ensembl gene IDs rownames(x) using ensembldb::EnsDb annotation object adds gene_name column mcols(rowRanges(x)).  Version suffixes (e.g. .3 ENSG00000100181.3) stripped lookup.

title: Add gene symbols to rowRanges — addGeneSymbols
code: addGeneSymbols(x, ensdb = NULL)

title: Add gene symbols to rowRanges — addGeneSymbols
text: x tQTLExperiment (SummarizedExperiment::RangedSummarizedExperiment Ensembl IDs rownames). ensdb ensembldb::EnsDb object.  Defaults EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79::EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79 package installed.

title: Add gene symbols to rowRanges — addGeneSymbols
text: x additional gene_name metadata column rowRanges(x).

title: Add gene symbols to rowRanges — addGeneSymbols
code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment") tqe <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed"),     genome      = "hg38" ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... if (requireNamespace("EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79", quietly = TRUE))     tqe <- addGeneSymbols(tqe)

what: Cache MAGE chr17 PLINK files from GitHub releases — cache_mage_chr17_plink
title: Cache MAGE chr17 PLINK files from GitHub releases — cache_mage_chr17_plink
text: Downloads three PLINK files (CCDG_mage_chr17.fam, .bim, .bed) vjcitn/CSHLvc2026 GitHub release BiocFileCache subdirectory.  Files re-downloaded absent cache. authentication required.

title: Cache MAGE chr17 PLINK files from GitHub releases — cache_mage_chr17_plink
code: cache_mage_chr17_plink(   release_url = paste0("https://github.com/vjcitn/CSHLvc2026/",     "releases/download/v0.1.0-data"),   bfc = BiocFileCache::BiocFileCache(),   verbose = TRUE,   validate_bed = TRUE )

title: Cache MAGE chr17 PLINK files from GitHub releases — cache_mage_chr17_plink
text: release_url Base URL GitHub release assets.  Defaults v0.1.0-data release vjcitn/CSHLvc2026. bfc BiocFileCache::BiocFileCache object.  Defaults user-level cache. verbose Logical.  Emit progress messages?  Default TRUE. validate_bed Logical.  Check .bed magic bytes download? Default TRUE.

title: Cache MAGE chr17 PLINK files from GitHub releases — cache_mage_chr17_plink
text: named list elements fam, bim, bed, character scalar giving local path cached file.  three share directory stem, tools::file_path_sans_ext(result[["bed"]]) gives PLINK prefix use tQTLExperimentFromRSE().

title: Cache MAGE chr17 PLINK files from GitHub releases — cache_mage_chr17_plink
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ plink <- cache_mage_chr17_plink() plpre <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(plink[["bed"]]) } # }

what: Plot phenotype values grouped by SNP genotype — plotGenotypeEffect
title: Plot phenotype values grouped by SNP genotype — plotGenotypeEffect
text: Creates beeswarm plot comparing phenotype across genotype groups (0, 1, 2 copies alternate allele) given SNP.  Useful visualizing effect significant eQTL variant.

title: Plot phenotype values grouped by SNP genotype — plotGenotypeEffect
code: plotGenotypeEffect(   x,   snp_id,   phenotype_id,   assayName = NULL,   size = 2,   color = "steelblue",   title = NULL )

title: Plot phenotype values grouped by SNP genotype — plotGenotypeEffect
text: x tQTLExperiment. snp_id Character. SNP identifier (row name variantRanges(x)). phenotype_id Character. Phenotype/gene identifier (row name rowRanges(x)). assayName Name assay use. Defaults first assay. size Point size beeswarm. Default 2. color Color points. Default "steelblue". title Main plot title. NULL, auto-generated SNP gene.

title: Plot phenotype values grouped by SNP genotype — plotGenotypeEffect
text: ggplot2 plot object.

title: Plot phenotype values grouped by SNP genotype — plotGenotypeEffect
code: data(mageSEfilt, package="CSHLvc2026") plink_paths <- cache_mage_chr17_plink() #> [ cache hit   ] CCDG_mage_chr17.fam #> [ cache hit   ] CCDG_mage_chr17.bim #> [ cache hit   ] CCDG_mage_chr17.bed #> [ validate    ] Checking .bed magic bytes ... #> [ validate    ] .bed magic bytes OK. plpre <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(plink_paths[["bed"]]) cd <- as.data.frame(colData(mageSEfilt)) mm <- model.matrix(~ batch + population + sex, data = cd) mm <- mm[, -1, drop = FALSE]   # remove (Intercept) tqe <- tQTLExperimentFromRSE(     se              = mageSEfilt,     plinkPrefix     = plpre,     covariateMatrix = mm,     genome          = "hg38" ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from CCDG_mage_chr17.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from CCDG_mage_chr17.bim... plotGenotypeEffect(tqe, "17:410391:T:C", "ENSG00000187624.9")

what: Prepare input files and return the tensorQTL CLI command — prepareTQTL
title: Prepare input files and return the tensorQTL CLI command — prepareTQTL
text: Writes phenotype BED file (optionally) covariate file user-specified directory, returns complete python -m tensorqtl command string.  user runs command terminal Python/conda environment properly configured, calls readTQTL() load results back R.

title: Prepare input files and return the tensorQTL CLI command — prepareTQTL
code: prepareTQTL(   x,   outDir,   mode = c("cis_nominal", "cis", "cis_independent", "trans"),   assayName = NULL,   mafThreshold = 0.05,   window = 1000000L,   permutations = 1000L,   python = "python3",   ... )

title: Prepare input files and return the tensorQTL CLI command — prepareTQTL
text: x tQTLExperiment. outDir Path existing directory hold intermediate input files tensorQTL output.  Must specified caller - default provided. mode One "cis_nominal", "cis", "cis_independent", "trans". Passed --mode. assayName Name assay use phenotype matrix. Defaults first assay. mafThreshold MAF threshold. Defaults 0.05. window Cis-window base pairs. Defaults 1000000. permutations Permutations "cis" mode. Defaults 1000. python Path Python executable embed returned command string. Defaults "python3". ... Additional --key value flags passed tensorQTL verbatim.

title: Prepare input files and return the tensorQTL CLI command — prepareTQTL
text: character string containing complete shell command run. string also printed via message() easy copy-paste.

title: Prepare input files and return the tensorQTL CLI command — prepareTQTL
code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment") tqe <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed") ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... cmd <- prepareTQTL(tqe, outDir = tempdir(), mode = "cis_nominal") #> Run the following command in a terminal with tensorqtl available: #>  #> python3 -m tensorqtl /private/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T/RtmpuS4nx1/temp_libpath5a4b140770e5/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100 /var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9/pheno.bed /var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9/tqtl_out --mode cis_nominal --maf_threshold 0.05 --window 1000000 -o /var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9 #>  #> Then call readTQTL('/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9', mode = 'cis_nominal') to load results into R. cat(cmd, "\n") #> python3 -m tensorqtl /private/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T/RtmpuS4nx1/temp_libpath5a4b140770e5/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100 /var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9/pheno.bed /var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9/tqtl_out --mode cis_nominal --maf_threshold 0.05 --window 1000000 -o /var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T//RtmpZ37bY9

what: Read tensorQTL results into R — readTQTL
title: Read tensorQTL results into R — readTQTL
text: Reads output files written tensorQTL run GenomicRanges::GRanges objects, matched features originating tQTLExperiment.

title: Read tensorQTL results into R — readTQTL
code: readTQTL(   outDir,   mode = c("cis_nominal", "cis", "cis_independent", "trans"),   x = NULL )

title: Read tensorQTL results into R — readTQTL
text: outDir directory passed prepareTQTL(). mode mode used tensorQTL run. x tQTLExperiment used generate input files, used attach feature coordinates region-level results.

title: Read tensorQTL results into R — readTQTL
text: named list GenomicRanges::GRanges: pairs (cis_nominal) Feature-variant pairs association statistics. hits (cis) One range per feature permutation p-value. output_files (modes) Paths raw output files.

title: Read tensorQTL results into R — readTQTL

code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment") tqe <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed") ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... tqe[1:5, 1:10] #> class: tQTLExperiment #> features: 5  samples: 10  #> assays( 1 ): pheno  #> rowRanges: GRanges with 5 features #> colData( 0 ) covariates:    #> geno: 10 samples x 69638 variants [BEDMatrix - lazy] #> plinkPrefix: /private/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T/RtmpuS4nx1/temp_libpath5a4b140770e5/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100  #> use prepareTQTL() to write inputs and get CLI command

what: tQTLExperiment: a SummarizedExperiment for tensorQTL eQTL mapping — tQTLExperiment-class
title: tQTLExperiment: a SummarizedExperiment for tensorQTL eQTL mapping — tQTLExperiment-class
text: tQTLExperiment extends SummarizedExperiment::RangedSummarizedExperiment hold data needed tensorQTL eQTL mapping tool:

title: tQTLExperiment: a SummarizedExperiment for tensorQTL eQTL mapping — tQTLExperiment-class
text: assays: phenotype matrix (features × samples) rowRanges: genomic coordinates phenotype feature (gene) colData: per-sample metadata including covariates geno: lazy BEDMatrix::BEDMatrix PLINK .bed file (samples × variants); data loaded subscripted variantRanges: GenomicRanges::GRanges variant, metadata columns snp_id, ref, alt plinkPrefix: path prefix PLINK file set tensorQTL invoked via CLI (python -m tensorqtl) supports GPU acceleration CUDA Apple MPS (Metal Performance Shaders) Apple Silicon.

title: tQTLExperiment: a SummarizedExperiment for tensorQTL eQTL mapping — tQTLExperiment-class
text: geno BEDMatrix::BEDMatrix (samples × variants). variantRanges GenomicRanges::GRanges length equal ncol(geno). plinkPrefix length-one character string giving PLINK file prefix.

what: Construct a tQTLExperiment from input files — tQTLExperiment
title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from input files — tQTLExperiment
text: Reads phenotype, covariate, variant metadata files tQTLExperiment object. Genotype data represented lazily via BEDMatrix::BEDMatrix.

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from input files — tQTLExperiment
code: tQTLExperiment(   plinkPrefix,   phenoFile,   covFile = NULL,   assayName = "pheno",   genome = NA_character_ )

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from input files — tQTLExperiment
text: plinkPrefix Path prefix PLINK file set (.bed, .bim, .fam). phenoFile Path phenotype BED file (tab-separated, columns #chr, start, end, phenotype_id, one column per sample; 0-based half-open coordinates). covFile Path covariate file. tensorQTL expects covariates rows first column covariate name remaining columns sample values (covariates × samples). NULL, covariate file used. assayName Name assign phenotype matrix assays(). Defaults "pheno". genome Genome build string (e.g. "hg38") assigned seqinfo rowRanges. Defaults NA (unspecified).

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from input files — tQTLExperiment
text: tQTLExperiment object.

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from input files — tQTLExperiment
code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment") tqe <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed"),     covFile     = file.path(exdir, "cov-n100-tqtl.tsv"),     genome      = "hg38" ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... tqe #> class: tQTLExperiment #> features: 20  samples: 100  #> assays( 1 ): pheno  #> rowRanges: GRanges with 20 features #> colData( 11 ) covariates: int, sex, age, expr_pc1 ...  #> geno: 100 samples x 69638 variants [BEDMatrix - lazy] #> plinkPrefix: /private/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T/RtmpuS4nx1/temp_libpath5a4b140770e5/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100  #> use prepareTQTL() to write inputs and get CLI command

what: Construct a tQTLExperiment from a RangedSummarizedExperiment — tQTLExperimentFromRSE
title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from a RangedSummarizedExperiment — tQTLExperimentFromRSE
text: Converts existing SummarizedExperiment::RangedSummarizedExperiment tQTLExperiment attaching PLINK genotype data.

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from a RangedSummarizedExperiment — tQTLExperimentFromRSE
code: tQTLExperimentFromRSE(   se,   plinkPrefix,   covariateMatrix = NULL,   assayName = NULL,   featureIdColumn = NULL,   genome = NA_character_ )

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from a RangedSummarizedExperiment — tQTLExperimentFromRSE
text: se SummarizedExperiment::RangedSummarizedExperiment. plinkPrefix Path prefix PLINK file set. covariateMatrix numeric matrix (rows = samples, cols = covariates) built e.g. stats::model.matrix() .data.frame(colData(se)). See also ExploreModelMatrix package. Rename (Intercept) int including intercept. assayName Name assay se use. Defaults first. featureIdColumn Optional mcols column name use phenotype_id; defaults rownames(se). genome Genome build string (e.g. "hg38") assigned seqinfo rowRanges. Defaults NA (unspecified).

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from a RangedSummarizedExperiment — tQTLExperimentFromRSE
text: tQTLExperiment object.

title: Construct a tQTLExperiment from a RangedSummarizedExperiment — tQTLExperimentFromRSE
code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment") tqe_ref <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed") ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... se <- as(tqe_ref, "RangedSummarizedExperiment") cd <- as.data.frame(colData(tqe_ref)) mm <- model.matrix(~ 1, data = cd) colnames(mm)[1] <- "int" tqe2 <- tQTLExperimentFromRSE(se,     plinkPrefix     = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     covariateMatrix = mm) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... tqe2 #> class: tQTLExperiment #> features: 20  samples: 100  #> assays( 1 ): pheno  #> rowRanges: GRanges with 20 features #> colData( 1 ) covariates: int   #> geno: 100 samples x 69638 variants [BEDMatrix - lazy] #> plinkPrefix: /private/var/folders/yw/gfhgh7k565v9w83x_k764wbc0000gp/T/RtmpuS4nx1/temp_libpath5a4b140770e5/tQTLExperiment/extdata/chr22-n100  #> use prepareTQTL() to write inputs and get CLI command

code: exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment") tqe <- tQTLExperiment(     plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),     phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed") ) #> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam... #> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim... tqtlVariantRanges(tqe) #> GRanges object with 69638 ranges and 3 metadata columns: #>                  seqnames    ranges strand |         snp_id         ref #>                     <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle> |    <character> <character> #>   22:16849573A-G       22  16849573      * | 22:16849573A-G           A #>   22:16849971A-T       22  16849971      * | 22:16849971A-T           A #>   22:16850437G-A       22  16850437      * | 22:16850437G-A           G #>   22:16851225C-T       22  16851225      * | 22:16851225C-T           C #>   22:16851356C-T       22  16851356      * | 22:16851356C-T           C #>              ...      ...       ...    ... .            ...         ... #>   22:51202748A-G       22  51202748      * | 22:51202748A-G           A #>   22:51208568G-T       22  51208568      * | 22:51208568G-T           G #>   22:51211031A-G       22  51211031      * | 22:51211031A-G           A #>   22:51213613C-T       22  51213613      * | 22:51213613C-T           C #>   22:51216564T-C       22  51216564      * | 22:51216564T-C           T #>                          alt #>                  <character> #>   22:16849573A-G           G #>   22:16849971A-T           T #>   22:16850437G-A           A #>   22:16851225C-T           T #>   22:16851356C-T           T #>              ...         ... #>   22:51202748A-G           G #>   22:51208568G-T           T #>   22:51211031A-G           G #>   22:51213613C-T           T #>   22:51216564T-C           C #>   ------- #>   seqinfo: 1 sequence from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths
